normalizationSummary: Turn the sale-themed six-post set into reusable promotion, launch, and limited-time offer templates.
whyNow: This pack has direct commercial value and is a strong fit for offers-and-launches content.

candidateTemplates.name: Business Sale Announcement
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Announce a sale, campaign, or time-sensitive business offer.
candidateTemplates.rationale: High-frequency use case for many small businesses.

candidateTemplates.name: Business Sale Stat
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Lead with a discount, percentage, or headline stat.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Gives the library a more aggressive promo format alongside the standard announcement layout.
